description: A mathematical psychology professor needs you to compute the EZ-diffusion parameters (drift rate v, boundary separation a, and non-decision time Ter) for the Word_HighFreq and Word_LowFreq conditions for each valid participant using Lexical Decision Task data from ~/pebl/data/ldt_data.csv (Columns: participant_id, trial, condition, accuracy, rt_ms). Exclude sub-999 (zero variance) and ignore NonWord trials. For each condition, calculate Pc (accuracy), MRT (mean correct RT in seconds), and VRT (sample variance of correct RTs in seconds squared), applying an edge correction of Pc = 1 - 1/(2N) if Pc == 1.0. metadata.data_source: Domain-specific data generation simulating LDT lognormal human performance patterns.
